# lxp syscall compatibility matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/syscalls/check-syscalls.sh --emit-matrix. Do not edit by hand;
     CI fails if this file drifts from the sources. -->

Every syscall the lxp personality answers, cross-checked against the ARM EABI reference
(`scripts/syscalls/arm-eabi.tbl`) and classified in `scripts/syscalls/dispositions.tsv`.
Numbers come from `include/lxp/lxp_syscall.h`; dispositions are proved against the
handlers in `src/lxp_syscall.c` / `src/lxp_run.c` by the coverage guard.

Surface: 138 LXP_NR_* — 95 implemented, 32 benign-stub, 1 refused-eopnotsupp, 10 run-loop-handled, 0 deliberately-enosys.

| Number | Name | Disposition | Notes |
|---:|---|---|---|
| 1 | exit | implemented |  |
| 2 | fork | run-loop-handled | spawns a child sharing the parent region |
| 3 | read | implemented |  |
| 4 | write | implemented |  |
| 5 | open | implemented |  |
| 6 | close | implemented |  |
| 10 | unlink | implemented |  |
| 11 | execve | implemented | captured; the run loop loads the image |
| 12 | chdir | implemented |  |
| 15 | chmod | implemented |  |
| 19 | lseek | implemented |  |
| 20 | getpid | implemented |  |
| 21 | mount | benign-stub | no-op (synthetic /proc + overlay always present) |
| 33 | access | implemented |  |
| 36 | sync | benign-stub | no backing store to flush |
| 37 | kill | run-loop-handled | self-signal inline / cross-proc via pending_sig |
| 38 | rename | implemented |  |
| 39 | mkdir | implemented |  |
| 40 | rmdir | implemented |  |
| 41 | dup | implemented |  |
| 42 | pipe | implemented |  |
| 43 | times | implemented | uptime ticks; per-proc breakdown zeroed |
| 45 | brk | implemented |  |
| 52 | umount2 | benign-stub | no-op |
| 54 | ioctl | implemented |  |
| 55 | fcntl | implemented |  |
| 57 | setpgid | benign-stub | accepted (inert) |
| 60 | umask | implemented | stored per-proc, returns previous |
| 63 | dup2 | implemented |  |
| 64 | getppid | implemented |  |
| 65 | getpgrp | benign-stub | returns pid; process group == pid |
| 66 | setsid | benign-stub | returns pid; no session machinery |
| 78 | gettimeofday | implemented |  |
| 83 | symlink | implemented |  |
| 85 | readlink | implemented |  |
| 88 | reboot | implemented | HALT/POWEROFF/RESTART latch the run |
| 91 | munmap | implemented | exact arena-backed live extents; zero-copy/device maps are no-op |
| 94 | fchmod | benign-stub | modes not tracked |
| 104 | setitimer | implemented | ITIMER_REAL -> SIGALRM |
| 114 | wait4 | implemented | reaps / blocks via the run loop |
| 116 | sysinfo | implemented | uptime + live process count + host system-heap stats |
| 118 | fsync | benign-stub | writable overlay is RAM |
| 119 | sigreturn | run-loop-handled | restores the pre-signal frame |
| 120 | clone | run-loop-handled | CLONE_VM treated as a co-running thread |
| 122 | uname | implemented | Linux identity + host RTOS/version/build revisions |
| 125 | mprotect | benign-stub | no-op (NOMMU: no page protection) |
| 140 | _llseek | implemented |  |
| 141 | getdents | implemented | 32-bit dirent (uClibc readdir) |
| 146 | writev | implemented |  |
| 148 | fdatasync | benign-stub | writable overlay is RAM |
| 158 | sched_yield | benign-stub | FreeRTOS time-slices peers |
| 162 | nanosleep | implemented | parks via the run loop |
| 168 | poll | implemented |  |
| 172 | prctl | benign-stub | accepted (inert) |
| 173 | rt_sigreturn | run-loop-handled | restores the pre-signal frame |
| 174 | rt_sigaction | implemented | records the per-signal disposition |
| 175 | rt_sigprocmask | implemented | maintains the per-proc blocked mask; honored at delivery |
| 179 | rt_sigsuspend | implemented | LinuxThreads suspend(): parks, returns -EINTR |
| 180 | pread64 | implemented |  |
| 181 | pwrite64 | implemented |  |
| 183 | getcwd | implemented |  |
| 190 | vfork | run-loop-handled | parent parks until the child execs/exits |
| 192 | mmap2 | implemented | arena-backed anonymous/copied-file maps; read-only rootfs zero-copy; device hook |
| 194 | ftruncate64 | implemented |  |
| 195 | stat64 | implemented |  |
| 196 | lstat64 | implemented |  |
| 197 | fstat64 | implemented |  |
| 199 | getuid32 | benign-stub | returns 0 (root) |
| 200 | getgid32 | benign-stub | returns 0 (root) |
| 201 | geteuid32 | benign-stub | returns 0 (root) |
| 202 | getegid32 | benign-stub | returns 0 (root) |
| 203 | setreuid32 | benign-stub | privilege drop accepted (inert) |
| 204 | setregid32 | benign-stub | privilege drop accepted (inert) |
| 206 | setgroups32 | benign-stub | uid/gid not enforced (inert) |
| 207 | fchown32 | benign-stub | ownership not enforced |
| 208 | setresuid32 | benign-stub | privilege drop accepted (inert) |
| 209 | getresuid32 | benign-stub | all root (0) |
| 210 | setresgid32 | benign-stub | privilege drop accepted (inert) |
| 211 | getresgid32 | benign-stub | all root (0) |
| 212 | chown32 | benign-stub | ownership not enforced (dropbear chowns the pty) |
| 213 | setuid32 | benign-stub | uid/gid not enforced (inert) |
| 214 | setgid32 | benign-stub | uid/gid not enforced (inert) |
| 217 | getdents64 | implemented |  |
| 221 | fcntl64 | implemented |  |
| 224 | gettid | implemented | single-threaded: tid == pid |
| 238 | tkill | run-loop-handled |  |
| 240 | futex | run-loop-handled | co-running threads: WAIT parks, WAKE resumes (lxp_futex) |
| 248 | exit_group | implemented |  |
| 256 | set_tid_address | benign-stub | returns a fixed tid |
| 263 | clock_gettime | implemented | 32-bit time_t |
| 265 | clock_nanosleep | implemented | parks via the run loop |
| 266 | statfs64 | implemented | synthetic df values |
| 267 | fstatfs64 | implemented | synthetic df values |
| 268 | tgkill | run-loop-handled |  |

| 291 | recv | implemented | NET-gated |

| 296 | sendmsg | implemented | NET-gated; iovec gather, no ancillary data |
| 297 | recvmsg | implemented | NET-gated; iovec scatter, no ancillary data |

| 323 | mkdirat | implemented |  |
| 327 | fstatat64 | implemented |  |

| 356 | eventfd2 | implemented | curl threaded-resolver wakeup |
| 358 | dup3 | implemented |  |

| 369 | prlimit64 | benign-stub | reports finite limits; new accepted (inert) |

| 384 | getrandom | implemented | host `random_fill`; bounded; fails closed when unavailable |
| 397 | statx | implemented | mask arg ignored |
| 403 | clock_gettime64 | implemented | 64-bit time_t |

| 439 | faccessat2 | implemented |  |
